paper_title: Biosynthesis and Analysis of Silver Nanoparticles from Marine Diatoms

methods.description: This method involves using UV-vis spectroscopy to confirm the formation and stability of biosynthesized silver nanoparticles (AgNPs) from marine diatoms. The analysis helps determine the size and shape of the nanoparticles by observing the surface plasmon resonance (SPR) band.

steps.description: Add harvested biomass to AgNO3 solution under continuous stirring at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: mix biomass with AgNO3 solution under stirring

steps.description: Observe color change from colorless to pale yellow, then to reddish-brown after incubation.
Perform UV-vis spectroscopy to confirm nanoparticle formation and stability.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct UV-vis spectroscopy for nanoparticle analysis

steps.description: Analyze absorption spectra to determine SPR band and nanoparticle size.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze SPR band from UV-vis spectra

methods.method_name: Particle Size and Zeta Potential Analysis
methods.description: This method uses Dynamic Light Scattering (DLS) and zeta potential measurements to analyze the particle size distribution and surface charge of biosynthesized AgNPs, providing insights into their stability.

steps.description: Disperse filtered and purified nanoparticles in double distilled water at neutral pH.
Use a particle size analyzer to measure particle size distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: measure particle size distribution with analyzer

steps.description: Measure zeta potential to assess surface charge and stability.
steps.searchable_summary: measure zeta potential for stability analysis

methods.method_name: Surface Morphological Studies with SEM-EDX Analysis
methods.description: This method involves using Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) and Energy Dispersive X-ray (EDX) analysis to study the shape, size, and surface morphology of biosynthesized AgNPs, as well as to confirm the presence of Ag+ ions.

steps.description: Characterize shape, size, and surface morphology using SEM.
Record EDX spectra to investigate nanoparticle composition.
steps.searchable_summary: record EDX spectra for composition analysis

steps.description: Analyze EDX spectra to confirm presence of Ag+ ions and other elements.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze EDX spectra for elemental confirmation
